ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., accelerometer, gyroscope, temperature) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the data collection */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the data collection */,
  "sampling_rate" REAL /* Sampling rate of the data collection */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that the data point belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the data point was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data point (e.g., good, bad, unknown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accelerometer_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accelerometer data point */,
  "x" REAL /* Acceleration in the x-axis */,
  "y" REAL /* Acceleration in the y-axis */,
  "z" REAL /* Acceleration in the z-axis */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gyroscope_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gyroscope data point */,
  "x" REAL /* Angular velocity in the x-axis */,
  "y" REAL /* Angular velocity in the y-axis */,
  "z" REAL /* Angular velocity in the z-axis */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature data point */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor calibration */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that the calibration belongs to */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration */,
  "calibration_data" TEXT /* Calibration data */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibrations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that triggered the alert */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggered the alert */,
  "trigger_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor configuration */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that the configuration belongs to */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Sensor configuration details */,
  "configuration_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_configurations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality metric */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that the source belongs to */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
